projects.title: Registro Cosmético — Regulatory Consultancy
projects.description: Production site for a cosmetics regulatory consultancy handling import and ISPCH registration in Chile. Static Astro landing with an onboarding funnel, import guide, diagnostic quiz, and consultation booking integrated with Google Calendar and Brevo.
features: Consultation booking: free slots read from Google Calendar, events auto-created to block each slot
Lead capture in Brevo with automated confirmation emails
Diagnostic quiz and import guide built with Astro content collections
SEO with JSON-LD, automatic sitemap and per-page metadata

projects.title: Geekhub Marketplace
projects.description: Fullstack marketplace for geek merchandise with user accounts, product listings, shopping cart and ratings. Backend follows an MVC architecture; React frontend manages global state with the Context API.
features: Shopping cart and star-based product ratings
Users can list, edit and delete their own products
MVC backend tested with Vitest + Supertest

projects.title: Backend for Collaborative Academic Repository
projects.description: Project in development: backend for a collaborative repository of academic articles, built in TypeScript with Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL. Implements JWT authentication with refresh tokens and HTTP-only cookies, role-based access control (RBAC), and Swagger/OpenAPI documentation.
features: JWT access tokens with refresh tokens in HttpOnly cookies
Backoffice user management with pagination, filtering and sorting
Documented with Swagger/OpenAPI, Dockerized with PostgreSQL

projects.title: RioLeufu Hotel
projects.description: Responsive hotel website built with React and Tailwind CSS, with multi-language support via i18next and automatic browser-language detection.
features: Multi-language UI with i18next + automatic language detection
Fully responsive design with Tailwind CSS
